title: Applicable Editions
full_text:
1.3.1.2 Applicable Editions
Applicable Editions
1) Where documents are referenced in this Code, they shall be the editions
designated in Table 1.3.1.2. (See also Note A-1.5.1.1.(1) of Division A.)
